data.title: South Korea to Amend Pension Act to Include Overseas and Virtual Assets
data.description: South Korea is working on amending its Basic Pension Act to include overseas and virtual assets in the assessment of basic pension eligibility. According to NS3.AI, the government aims to prevent high-net-worth individuals from exploiting loopholes in the existing system and enhance fairness. Currently, assessments primarily focus on domestic assets, making it challenging to track holdings like Bitcoin and overseas financial assets.

data.title: 21Shares Updates Hyperliquid ETF Application with Proposed Ticker THYP
data.description: 21Shares has revised its application for a Hyperliquid ETF, proposing THYP as the ticker, according to Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart. The management fee for the ETF has not been disclosed yet.

data.title: XRP Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on April 14
data.description: U.S. XRP spot ETFs experienced substantial net inflows totaling $11.1982 million on April 14, Eastern Time. According to NS3.AI, Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ) was the leading contributor, attracting $6.64 million in net inflows.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Potential U.S.-Iran Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump discussed the future of U.S.-Iran relations in a recent interview. According to BlockBeats, Trump expressed optimism about the possibility of reaching an agreement with Iran. He stated, "We will see what happens next. I believe Iran is very eager to make a deal."

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.273 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $1.273 million yesterday (April 14th, Eastern Time). The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Fidelity Solana Fund ETF (FSOL), with a net inflow of $994,800, bringing its total historical net inflow to $152 million. The second largest was the VanEck Solana ETF (VSOL), with a net inflow of $278,100, bringing its total historical net inflow to $18.5412 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs was $818 million, with an equity ratio of 1.70%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $976 million.

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs Experience Significant Inflows on April 14
data.description:
On April 14, Solana spot ETFs saw substantial inflows, according to Odaily. Data from SoSoValue indicates that the total net inflow for Solana spot ETFs reached $1.273 million on that day.

The Fidelity Solana Fund ETF (FSOL) led the inflows with $994,800, bringing its historical total net inflow to $152 million. Following FSOL, the VanEck Solana ETF (VSOL) recorded a net inflow of $278,100, with its historical total net inflow reaching $18.5412 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $818 million, with a net asset ratio of 1.70%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $976 million.

data.title: Apple Urges iOS Users to Update for Enhanced Security
data.description: On April 15, Apple announced that security researchers have identified web-based attacks targeting outdated versions of iOS. According to BlockBeats, these attacks exploit malicious web content to compromise devices running older iOS versions. Apple advises users to update their iPhones promptly to safeguard their data. For those unable to update, enabling lock mode is recommended if the device supports it, as a measure against malicious web content and other threats.

data.title: South Korea Advances Stablecoin Regulation Amid Global Discussions
data.description: South Korea has taken a proactive approach to stablecoin regulation, moving beyond the discussions seen in other countries. According to PANews, while many nations are still debating the boundaries of stablecoin oversight, South Korea is addressing the practical aspects of managing the flow of money. The focus is not on how to regulate, but rather on where to intercept the financial transactions already occurring. This development highlights South Korea's forward-thinking stance in the evolving landscape of digital currency regulation.

data.title: Crypto.com partners with High Roller to enter the prediction market
data.description: Crypto exchange Crypto.com has signed a definitive agreement with High Roller Technologies to enter the prediction market space by integrating its business. The related event contracts will be offered through CDNA, an exchange registered with the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), targeting U.S. users and competing with platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: OpenAI releases the GPT-5.4-Cyber ​​model, offering low rejection rate capabilities to security professionals.
data.description: OpenAI announced the release of the GPT-5.4-Cyber ​​model, a fine-tuned version of GPT-5.4 for cybersecurity scenarios. Under specific conditions, it reduces the restrictions on rejecting security-related requests to support advanced operations such as binary reverse engineering. The model is only available to vetted security vendors, enterprise security teams, and researchers through the Trusted Access for Cybersecurity (TAC) program. OpenAI stated that a tiered mechanism will limit the model's usage and impose additional constraints on access in low-visibility scenarios.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4-Cyber Model for Cybersecurity
data.description:
OpenAI has announced the release of its GPT-5.4-Cyber model, specifically fine-tuned for cybersecurity applications. According to Odaily, this model is designed to reduce restrictions on security-related requests under certain conditions, enabling specialized operations such as binary reverse engineering.

The GPT-5.4-Cyber model is exclusively available through the 'Trusted Access for Cybersecurity' (TAC) program. This program grants access only to vetted security vendors, corporate security teams, and researchers. OpenAI has implemented a tiered mechanism to limit the model's usage and has imposed additional constraints for low-visibility scenarios.

data.title: Kraken has secretly filed for a US IPO, with a latest valuation of approximately $13.3 billion.
data.description: Arjun Sethi, co-CEO of cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, confirmed that the company has secretly filed for an IPO with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Data shows that Kraken's current valuation is approximately $13.3 billion, down from its valuation of approximately $20 billion in November 2025. The company had previously suspended its IPO plans due to market conditions. Separately, it was reported that Deutsche Börse has committed approximately $200 million to acquire approximately 1.5% of Kraken's fully diluted equity. (CNBC)

data.title: The bullish whales have closed out a total of 1,500 BTC and 95,000 ETH, realizing a profit of $50.42 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst EmberCN, a certain address closed out approximately 1,500 BTC and 95,000 ETH long positions from yesterday to early this morning, with a total position value of approximately $339 million, realizing a profit of approximately $50.42 million. Currently, the address still holds approximately 25,000 ETH long positions, valued at approximately $57.98 million.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock markets opened higher.
data.description: The Nikkei 225 index opened 410.48 points higher, or 0.71%, at 58,287.87 on Wednesday, April 15, marking its first breakthrough of 58,000 points since March. The South Korean KOSPI index opened 177.87 points higher, or 2.98%, at 6,145.62 on Wednesday, April 15. Samsung Electronics shares rose over 4%, and SK Hynix shares rose over 5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Anthropic has received investment offers from VCs for valuations up to $800 billion, significantly higher than its current valuation.
data.description: Anthropic has recently received investment offers from multiple venture capital firms, with some offers representing valuations as high as $800 billion, significantly higher than its current valuation. Previously, Anthropic completed a funding round in February of this year, valuing the company at approximately $380 billion; however, Caplight, a secondary market indicator, shows its valuation has risen to approximately $688 billion. Data shows that the company's annualized revenue has grown to approximately $30 billion, a significant increase from the end of last year. Market analysts indicate that with the rapid development of AI models and related products, investor attention to Anthropic continues to rise, and the company is considered a potential IPO candidate. (Business Insider)

data.title: Asian Stock Markets Experience Gains as Nikkei and KOSPI Rise
data.description: The Nikkei 225 index opened on April 15 with an increase of 410.48 points, marking a 0.71% rise to 58,287.87 points, surpassing the 58,000 mark for the first time since March. According to Odaily, the Korean KOSPI index also saw a significant rise, opening with an increase of 177.87 points, or 2.98%, reaching 6,145.62 points. Samsung Electronics' stock price rose over 4%, while SK Hynix's stock price increased by more than 5%.

data.title: Ether.fi Plans to Provide $3 Billion in Ethereum for Validator Liquidity
data.description:
Ether.fi, an Ethereum liquid staking protocol, has announced its intention to supply approximately $3 billion worth of Ethereum to the ETHGas market over the next three years. According to Odaily, this initiative will utilize around 2.8 million staked ETH managed by Ether.fi.

ETHGas functions as a futures market for Ethereum block space, enabling users to secure block space in advance to ensure transaction execution. The plan aims to enhance validator earnings and stabilize returns through specific mechanisms. Additionally, this approach is expected to offer developers and institutions more predictable transaction costs and execution efficiency.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic Valuation Reaches $800 Billion Amid Investor Interest
data.description: Anthropic, an artificial intelligence startup known for its Claude AI, has attracted significant attention from venture capital firms in recent weeks. According to Jin10, Business Insider reports that the company's valuation has soared to as high as $800 billion, reflecting the growing interest and investment in AI technologies.

data.title: Japan's Core Machinery Orders Surge in February
data.description: Japan's core machinery orders rose by 13.6% in February, surpassing expectations of a 1.1% decline, according to Jin10. The previous month's orders had decreased by 5.5%, highlighting a significant turnaround in February's performance. This unexpected increase suggests a potential recovery in Japan's machinery sector, which could have broader implications for the country's economic outlook.

data.title: X Introduces Cashtags Feature for Real-Time Financial Data Integration
data.description:
On April 15, X Product Lead and Solana Ecosystem Advisor Nikita Bier announced a new feature on the X platform. According to BlockBeats, the Cashtags feature has been launched for iPhone users in the United States and Canada, bringing real-time financial data directly into X.

The feature allows users to search or post Cashtags, or contract addresses, with X automatically recommending matching stocks or crypto tokens for easy asset selection. By clicking on any Cashtag, users can view related discussion threads and price charts without leaving the X platform.

This functionality ensures users can accurately match discussions to corresponding stocks or tokens. Cashtags represent the first step in X's ambition to become the preferred platform for financial and crypto communities. The platform aims to offer valuable and actionable content, facilitating seamless trading.

Additionally, X announced a pilot integration with Canadian brokerage Wealthsimple. Canadian users will see a button on the Cashtags page, enabling them to complete trades directly on the X platform.
